description: Create and activate a market research survey titled 'Beverage Packaging Concept Test 2025'. The survey must include a question group named 'Concept Evaluation' containing two 5-Point Choice questions (Codes: C1 and C2) asking 'How likely would you be to buy this design?'. Question C1 must feature 'concept_vibrant.png' and Question C2 must feature 'concept_minimalist.png' (source: ~/Documents/Concepts/). Both images must be uploaded to the survey resources server. Activate the survey.
